description: Structure and functioning of securities markets; principles of portfolio construction; models of the tradeoff between risk and expected return.

prerequisites.prerequisites_text: FINANCE/​ECON  300, (MATH 213or222) and (GEN BUS 307,317,656,ACT SCI 654,655,ECON 400,410,STAT/​MATH  310,STAT 312, or333or concurrent enrollment) or declared in undergraduate Business Exchange program
